text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from a day out with Sakura
Bakushin O, she tells me all about one of her
classmates.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was the girl who was leaving the academy. The
one who said how she wanted to give her best for
her final race.
choice_data_list: Her final race is tomorrow, isn't it?
Her final race is tomorrow, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We've done everything we could! She'll
definitely come in first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the race, all of Sakura Bakushin O's
classmates rush to watch the scrimmage.
choice_data_list: This is it!
This is it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You got this! Show us your best Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes! Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN! Right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, as the race begins, Sakura Bakushin O
and the other spectators let out an immense
cheer.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: That's it, that's it! You're in the zone!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's it! There! Show them the fruits of your
training!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: (Baku, everyone... Thank you so much)

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: (Watch! This is my...)

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: FULL POWER BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race is finally over and the results are in...

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Fifth! Fifth! She managed to place!

text_block_list.name: Classmate C
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, she's waving! She looks so happy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Classmate D
text_block_list.text: Baku?
choice_data_list: Sorry, let me talk to her alone.
Sorry, let me talk to her alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is noticeably shaken after
seeing the results, so I grab her hand and take her
somewhere we can talk without any onlookers.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sniff... My power wasn't enough!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Despite being the class representative... Despite
saying I would help her! She still couldn't take
first place!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That was her last race and yet I...
choice_data_list: But she looked so happy!
But she looked so happy!
Pull yourself together, Class Representative!
Pull yourself together, Class Representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That was her last race and yet I...
choice_data_list: But she looked so happy!
But she looked so happy!
Pull yourself together, Class Representative!
Pull yourself together, Class Representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That... I can't deny.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
She had such a bright and cheerful expression on
her face both when running and when crossing the
finish line.
choice_data_list: She achieved a result she could be proud of.
She achieved a result she could be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. I was the one focusing on her coming in
first place.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I misunderstood her wishes. I'm a pathetic
excuse for a class representative.
choice_data_list: You know what you need to do now, right?
You know what you need to do now, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Congratulate her on her success! By all means, I
should take the initiative!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ah, here you are, Baku!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That was the best I've ever placed!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to you and your trainer... That was
the best race ever!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: B-Baku?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A hug for giving it your all! You gave it your best
Bakushin out there!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Yes... Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O and her classmate shed tears
of joy as they embrace each other for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?!
choice_data_list: Remember what she was aiming for.
Remember what she was aiming for.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, she said she wanted to go out with a
bang and be satisfied with her final performance.
choice_data_list: Do you think she didn't try her best today?
Do you think she didn't try her best today?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No way! I would stake my name as class
representative and refute such claims with all my
heart!
choice_data_list: Then it doesn't matter if she came first or not.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...You're right. She achieved praiseworthy results!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I feel a little disappointed... but I guess feeling
like that is disrespectful to her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's go back to where she is! I'm going to shower
her with the utmost praise!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ah, here you are, Baku!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That was the best I've ever placed!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to you and your trainer... That was
the best race ever!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: B-Baku?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A hug for giving it your all! You gave it your best
Bakushin out there!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Yes... Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O and her classmate shed tears
of joy as they embrace each other for a long time.
